summary: Testing completed for chatbot support ticket system and seller/driver phone links. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All chatbot flows verified - message sending, support request, admin reply UI. Phone links verified for driver-customer and driver-seller communication.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/check-replies/{session_id} endpoint exists and works
✅ Backend: check-replies returns correct message counts
✅ Backend: check-replies returns has_new=False when caught up
✅ Backend: check-replies requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: POST /api/chatbot/admin/reply endpoint exists and works
✅ Backend: admin/reply requires admin role (403 for customer)
✅ Backend: admin/reply requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: admin/reply returns 404 for non-existent ticket
✅ Backend: FULL FLOW - user message → support request → admin reply → reply appears in check-replies
✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/history endpoint works
✅ Backend: chat history filter by session_id works
✅ Frontend: Customer login successful
✅ Frontend: Chatbot toggle button visible and clickable (data-testid='chatbot-toggle')
✅ Frontend: Chatbot window opens with welcome message and quick questions
✅ Frontend: Quick question 'أين طلبي؟' clickable and bot responds with order tracking info
✅ Frontend: 'التحدث مع موظف دعم' button visible and creates support request
✅ Frontend: Support request confirmation message 'تم إرسال طلبك لفريق الدعم' displayed
✅ Frontend: Admin support tickets panel shows ticket list with stats cards
✅ Frontend: Admin can select ticket to view details (customer info, message, status)
✅ Frontend: Admin reply input field 'اكتب ردك هنا...' visible
✅ Frontend: Admin 'إرسال' button visible for sending replies
✅ Frontend: Admin 'تم الحل' and 'استلام التذكرة' status buttons working
✅ Frontend: Delivery driver dashboard shows orders with customer phone links (tel:0933333333)
✅ Frontend: Delivery driver orders show both customer and seller phone links (tel:0911111111)
critical_code_review_comments: chatbot.py correctly saves admin reply as chat message with sender='support' in chat_messages collection
check-replies/{session_id} endpoint correctly uses last_count parameter for efficient polling
Chatbot.js implements polling every 5 seconds when hasSupportRequest is true
MyOrdersList.js correctly shows seller phone in bg-blue-50 section when seller_phone exists
SellerOrdersSection.js correctly shows driver info in bg-emerald-50 section when delivery_driver_id exists
All tel: links properly formatted for click-to-call functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All chatbot and phone link features verified

seed_data_creation: Used existing support tickets from previous testing sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chatbot support flow fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/chatbot/send, POST /api/chatbot/request-support, POST /api/chatbot/admin/reply, GET /api/chatbot/check-replies/{session_id}. Admin reply gets saved as sender='support' in chat_messages and appears via polling in user's chat. Phone links use tel: scheme and are visible in: MyOrdersList.js (driver sees seller phone), SellerOrdersSection.js (seller sees driver phone).

ui_elements.chatbot_window: Fixed bottom-left, opens on toggle click
ui_elements.quick_questions: Clickable buttons: أين طلبي؟, طرق الدفع, تكلفة الشحن, etc.
ui_elements.support_button: التحدث مع موظف دعم - appears after first message
